actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.sid,
       cymx.wftt,
       cymx.shr,
       cymx.ttr,
       cymx.ysfp,
       cymx.fttdh,
       cymx.tzr,
       cymx.wxmt,
       cymx.kzyh,
       cymx.khht,
       cymx.hbdm,
       cymx.jgtk,
       cymx.jhfs,
       cymx.ysfs,
       cymx.mdka,
       cymx.cyka,
       cymx.wfgs,
       cymx.khmc,
       cymx.order_id,
       cymx.cdmc,
       cymx.bzzl,
       cymx.fpbz,
       cymx.xyzhm,
       cymx.hwzpm,
       cymx.myfds,
       cymx.mygb,
       cymx.zysx,
       cymx.zzka,
       cymx.kfzy,
       cymx.kffp,
       cymx.ywry,
       cymx.bbgzje,
       cymx.fprq,
       cymx.yfzffs,
       cymx.dlmc,
       cymx.chyrq,
       cymx.hxdate,
       cymx.hxdh1,
       cymx.ssgs1,
       cymx.tdh,
       cymx.xh,
       cymx.fh,
       cymx.RMBkh,
       cymx.hgzl,
       cymx.sjmz,
       cymx.khjc,
       CYMX.xybx,
       cymx.kh_id,
       cymx.ywbm,
       cymx.mttp,
       cymx.ysgj,
       cymx.hglb,
       cymx.sjcy1,
       cymx.htjx,
       cymx.zgrq,
       cymx.zgrqj,
       cymx.hdsyfM,
       cymx.hdsyfR,
       cymx.dshl,
       CYMX.dszk,
       cymx.htje,
       cymx.wxjez,
       cymx.myjje,
       cymx.ayjje,
       cymx.huilv,
       cymx.kagj,
       cymx.kazb,
       my.mygb AS mygby
FROM cymx 
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mygb,zwmc FROM mygb) as my 
ON my.zwmc=cymx.kagj 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[报关明细.发票号码]) 
  AND permission('出运明细') 
ORDER BY cymx.sid DESC LIMIT 1
